name: PHQ-9 Depression Screening Procedure Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and LOINC codes for PHQ-9 (Patient Health Questionnaire-9) screening, including brief emotional/behavioral assessment, annual depression screening, and PHQ-9 specific scoring and documentation. Used in depression screening and follow-up (DSF) and depression remission or response measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Brief emotional/behavioral assessment (e.g., depression inventory, ADHD scale), with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Screening for clinical depression documented as performed using age-appropriate standardized tool AND follow-up plan documented if positive
Screening for clinical depression documented as positive AND follow-up plan documented
Screening for clinical depression documented as negative, follow-up plan not required
Administration of patient-focused health risk assessment instrument with scoring and documentation
Administration of caregiver-focused health risk assessment instrument for patient benefit, with scoring and documentation
Patient Health Questionnaire 9 item (PHQ-9) total score [Reported]
Patient Health Questionnaire 2 item (PHQ-2) total score [Reported]
